title: Crispy Orange Candied Peel
description: A sweet and crunchy snack made by candying orange peel and frying it until crispy.
instructions: Peel the orange and cut it into thin strips.
Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Add the orange peel strips to the sugar syrup and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the peel is tender and lightly caramelized.
Remove the peel from the syrup with a slotted spoon and let it cool on a wire rack.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Fry the candied orange peel in batches until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the fried peel on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
